assertions.title: Control cluster renders all buttons in edit mode with toolbar role

steps.expected: Tests prove all buttons, toolbar semantics, and drag region presence.
steps.observed: The VAL-TELE-006 block asserts Slower, Faster, Play, Line up, Line down, Snap, Lock overlay, Exit teleprompter, role=toolbar, aria-label, and data-tauri-drag-region.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-006
steps.expected: Only the assigned control-cluster checks pass.
steps.observed: Vitest passed: 1 file, 4 tests passed, 84 skipped.

steps.expected: editMode branch renders the toolbar cluster.
steps.observed: The implementation renders the control cluster only when editMode is true with role="toolbar" and aria-label="Teleprompter controls".

evidence.consoleErrors: N/A for vitest surface; focused run passed with React act(...) warnings in stderr only.

assertions.title: Controls hidden and pointer-events disabled when not in edit mode

steps.expected: Tests prove hidden controls, pointer-events behavior, and F6 hint visibility.
steps.observed: The VAL-TELE-007 block asserts no control buttons or toolbar render, root pointerEvents is none, viewport pointerEvents is auto, and the F6 edit hint is shown.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-007
steps.expected: Only the assigned non-editing checks pass.
steps.observed: Vitest passed: 1 file, 3 tests passed, 85 skipped.

steps.expected: Root disables pointer events while viewport stays interactive and hint renders when unlocked.
steps.observed: The root style switches to pointerEvents: none when editMode is false, the viewport remains pointerEvents: auto, and the F6 edit hint renders when !editMode && !hidden.

evidence.consoleErrors: N/A for vitest surface; focused run passed with React act(...) warnings in stderr only.

assertions.title: Snap popover opens/closes with grid cells and strip presets

steps.expected: Tests prove initial closed state, 9 grid cells, 5 strip presets, menu semantics, and Escape/outside-click close behavior.
steps.observed: The VAL-TELE-008 block covers all required open/close and structure assertions for the snap popover.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-008
steps.expected: Only the assigned snap-popover checks pass.
steps.observed: Vitest passed: 1 file, 6 tests passed, 82 skipped.

steps.expected: snapOpen toggles a popover with document-level close handlers.
steps.observed: The implementation tracks snapOpen, closes on Escape and outside mousedown, and renders SnapPopover with role="menu", aria-label="Snap presets", 9 grid cells, and 5 strip presets.

evidence.consoleErrors: N/A for vitest surface; focused run passed with React act(...) warnings in stderr only.

assertions.title: Snap presets persist correct rect and call set_overlay_rect IPC

steps.expected: Tests prove preset persistence, IPC calls, active preset state, and preset geometry.
steps.observed: The VAL-TELE-009 block verifies settings persistence, set_overlay_rect invocation, and active preset styling; viewportMath presetRect tests verify full, tr, tl, br, mc, top-strip, bottom-strip, left, and right geometry.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest subsets for VAL-TELE-009 and presetRect geometry
steps.observed: TeleprompterView passed: 1 file, 2 tests passed, 86 skipped. viewportMath passed: 1 file, 9 tests passed, 15 skipped.

steps.expected: Selecting a preset computes a rect, calls set_overlay_rect, and persists overlay settings.
steps.observed: applyPreset computes presetRect(screen), closes the popover, calls ipc.setOverlayRect(r), and updates overlayX/Y/Width/Height; presetRect defines the snap geometry used by those writes.

evidence.consoleErrors: N/A for vitest surface; focused runs passed with no stderr warnings in the VAL-TELE-009 and presetRect subsets.

assertions.title: Speed controls increment/decrement by 5, clamped to [5, 500]

steps.expected: Tests prove increment, decrement, clamping, and live readout.
steps.observed: The VAL-TELE-010 block covers Faster/Slower deltas, min/max clamp behavior, and the live speed value changing from 40 to 45.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-010
steps.observed: Vitest passed: 1 file, 5 tests passed, 83 skipped.

steps.expected: speedDelta clamps the stored value to the required range.
steps.observed: speedDelta uses Math.max(5, Math.min(500, settings.scrollSpeed + delta)) and the toolbar renders the live scrollSpeed readout.

evidence.consoleErrors: N/A for vitest surface; focused run passed with no stderr warnings.

assertions.title: Play/Pause toggle updates playing state with correct icon

steps.expected: Tests prove click toggle, icon swap, and Space behavior only in allowed contexts.
steps.observed: The VAL-TELE-011 block covers button toggling, ▶/⏸ icon swap, Space toggling in edit mode, Space ignored outside edit mode, and Space ignored on focused buttons/menuitems.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-011
steps.observed: Vitest passed: 1 file, 6 tests passed, 82 skipped.

steps.expected: The button and keydown handler toggle playing only when permitted.
steps.observed: The button title/ariaLabel/icon are derived from playing state and the keydown effect toggles on Space only when editMode is true and the active element is not an interactive control.

evidence.consoleErrors: N/A for vitest surface; focused run passed with React act(...) warnings in stderr only.

frictions.description: Focused TeleprompterView Vitest subsets for VAL-TELE-006, VAL-TELE-007, VAL-TELE-008, and VAL-TELE-011 emitted pre-existing React act(...) warnings on stderr even though all targeted assertions passed.
frictions.resolution: Used the passing Vitest exit status plus source inspection as the validation evidence and recorded the warnings as non-blocking noise.

summary: Tested 6 assigned overlay assertions with targeted Vitest subsets plus presetRect geometry coverage: all 6 passed and no blockers were encountered.
